# VSVersionInfo for butterPDF — the Windows file/product metadata the
# frozen .exe carries (Properties → Details). GENERATED by `butterpdf bake`; the
# version is injected at release time (committed form is 0.0.0). This is the
# VSVersionInfo PyInstaller specs commonly omit (docs/BAKING.md §5). filevers is a
# pre-validated 4-int tuple (butterpdf.bake) so a pre-release tag can't emit a non-int.
VSVersionInfo(
  ffi=FixedFileInfo(
    filevers=(0, 0, 0, 0),
    prodvers=(0, 0, 0, 0),
    mask=0x3f,
    flags=0x0,
    OS=0x40004,
    fileType=0x1,
    subtype=0x0,
    date=(0, 0),
  ),
  kids=[
    StringFileInfo([
      StringTable(
        '040904B0',
        [
          StringStruct('CompanyName', 'wolfgang warehaus'),
          StringStruct('FileDescription', 'Open, fill, sign, done — a fast frosted PDF tool.'),
          StringStruct('FileVersion', '0.0.0'),
          StringStruct('InternalName', 'butterpdf'),
          StringStruct('LegalCopyright', '© august — GPL-2.0-or-later'),
          StringStruct('OriginalFilename', 'butterpdf.exe'),
          StringStruct('ProductName', 'butterPDF'),
          StringStruct('ProductVersion', '0.0.0'),
        ],
      )
    ]),
    VarFileInfo([VarStruct('Translation', [1033, 1200])]),
  ],
)
